sources.title: Sell-Side Research Leadership and Org Design
claims: Sell-side research typically has a 3-tier hierarchy: Global Head -> Regional Head -> Sector Head.
Research leadership combines manager duties with idea production and client representation.
COO of Research manages budget, staffing, and workflow metrics.

sources.title: Company Coverage Analyst in Sell-Side Research
claims: Coverage Analyst deeply analyzes 10-20 companies and produces Buy/Sell/Hold recommendations.
Key deliverables include initiation reports, update notes, earnings previews/reviews, and flash notes.
Analyst title spans VP/Director/MD levels in sell-side organizations.

sources.title: Research Associate in Sell-Side Research
claims: Research Associate supports Analysts with financial modeling, data gathering, and draft writing.
Typical workload is 70% writing and 30% modeling, varying by analyst style.
Career path progresses from Associate to Analyst, then VP/Director/MD.

sources.title: Equity Strategist in Sell-Side Research
claims: Equity Strategist develops top-down market, index, and sector-level strategies.
Strategist complements bottom-up analysts by answering 'where to allocate'.
Deliverables include strategy outlooks, morning notes, sector rotation models, and earnings season previews.

sources.title: Macro Economist and Strategist
claims: Economist forecasts macro variables such as GDP, inflation, and rates.
Macro Strategist translates macro forecasts into asset price implications and trade recommendations.
Some firms split Chief Economist and Chief Markets Economist roles.

sources.title: Fixed Income and Credit Research
claims: Rates Strategist models yield curves and policy rate paths.
Credit Analyst evaluates issuer ratings, credit spreads, and default risk.
FIG and Structured Credit analysts cover financial bonds, CLOs, MBS, and ABS.

sources.title: Editorial and Publishing Operations
claims: Research Editor ensures clarity, logic, and structure without changing investment thesis.
Production Coordinator handles formatting, charts, and PDF generation.
Publication Manager coordinates Compliance, Legal, Sales, and distribution schedules.

sources.title: Research Sales and Distribution
claims: Research Sales translates analyst ideas into client-ready pitches and drives trading commissions.
Distribution Manager schedules morning calls and tracks research consumption metrics.
Corporate Access Manager connects corporate management with institutional investors.

sources.title: Research Compliance and Information Barriers
claims: Research Compliance Officer supervises information barriers and MNPI handling.
Supervisory Analyst (Series 16) pre-approves research reports for regulatory compliance.
Chinese wall separates research from investment banking to manage conflicts.

sources.title: ESG and Thematic Research
claims: ESG Research Analyst studies financially material ESG issues and develops integration tools.
ESG roles are among the fastest-growing in sell-side research due to regulation.
Thematic Analyst identifies long-term structural trends and beneficiaries across sectors.

sources.title: Generic Finance Career Forum Thread
claims: Forum discussions may contain anecdotes but lack structured role analysis.
